hero.title: Hi, I'm Dario.
hero.subtitle: I build efficient apps top to bottom: from the UI, over the ML to the high performance core.

about.heading: Edge ML, Flutter, and a soft spot for Japanese.
paras: I'm an ML engineer splitting time between Berlin, Kyoto and the rest of the world. I like squeezing machine-learning models onto tiny devices, building cross-platform apps with Flutter, and tinkering with IoT. With an M.S. in Computational Science, I specialise in deploying optimized NLP and CV models in the cloud, to the edge, or anywhere in between.
I'm the maker of DaKanji, a fully offline Japanese dictionary that recognises hand-drawn kanji. When a model runs entirely on-device, with no server and no waiting, that's the good stuff.

items.name: DaKanji
items.desc: An offline, cross-platform Japanese dictionary. Draw a kanji, get the reading. Works like magic on iOS, Android, Mac, Windows & Linux.

items.name: Kanji Recognition
items.desc: The ML model behind DaKanji. It recognises 6,500+ handwritten kanji plus all kana, entirely offline.

items.name: mecab_for_dart
items.desc: MeCab, the Japanese morphological analyzer, with clean Dart bindings that run on every platform.

items.name: ETLCDB reader
items.desc: A tidy Python loader for the ETL Character Database, the training data that makes handwriting models tick.

toolkit.heading: What I build with.
toolkit.intro: My tech stack: from UI to the high performance core that powers it all.

categories.desc: Training models, then shrinking them to run fully on-device with no server in the loop.
Fast, offline-first apps that ship to iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, Linux and web from one codebase.
Native bindings, embedded hardware, and the plumbing that keeps releases flowing.

roles.title: Machine Learning Engineer
bullets: Developed AI-driven form recognition that automatically maps and extracts field data with high accuracy.
Developed an AI summarization system for medical reports that extracts critical insights and reduces review time.

roles.title: Machine Learning Intern
bullets: Built a machine-learning recommender system for parametric 2D geometry.
Saves hundreds of engineering hours when creating CAD models.

roles.title: Quality Assurance Intern
bullets: Built a Python + Jenkins test-automation server to define, schedule and run tests.
Enhanced a Python testing tool, improving the reliability of systematic version testing.
Researched automated UI testing for legacy UI frameworks.

achievements.title: M.S. Computer Science · GPA 4.0

achievements.title: Google Open Source Peer Bonus
achievements.desc: Recognised by Google for open-source contributions.

achievements.title: Bundeswettbewerb Informatik
achievements.desc: 1st & 3rd prize in Germany's national computer-science competition.
